productDisplayName: Satya Paul Cream and Brown Saree
description: Style NoteThe house of satya paul is known and coveted world over for its drapy and bright all over printed pieces. This elegant saree from the brand is an embodiment of these very trends. Add on a silver neck-piece and stilettos in pop colours for a look that emanates charm and confidence.Product DetailsCream saree featuring a brown print, pink and lavender print at pallu, printed branding at waist, with brown blouse pieceMaterial and CareSilk crepe Dry clean onlySizeLength:6.5 mts
